name: selecto-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Selecto: Chrome Extension, Onboarding Client SDK, and SaaS Dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "dashboard,website,sdk" -c "blue,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:website" "npm run dev:sdk"
scripts.publish:onboarding: npm run build:sdk && npm publish -w selecto-onboarding-sdk --access public

author: Selecto Authors
